dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7962 IH: Export Dispute Resolution Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. McCormick introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Foreign Affairs

form.official-title: To amend the Export Control Reform Act of 2018 relating to the review of the interagency dispute resolution process.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Export Dispute Resolution Act.

section.header: Review of interagency dispute resolution process
section.text: Section 1763(c) of the Export Control Reform Act of 2018 (50 U.S.C. 4822(c)) is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking In any case and inserting the following:
by inserting countries subject to a comprehensive United States arms embargo, after matters relating to;
by striking may be decided and inserting shall be decided;

by adding at the end the following: The chair of the Committee is authorized to decide any case or matter described in the preceding sentence in which the Committee is unable to decide the case or matter by majority vote.; and
by further adding at the end the following:
In paragraph (1), the term country subject to a comprehensive United States arms embargo means—

subparagraph.text: any country listed on table 1 to paragraph (d)(1) of section 126.1 of title 22, Code of Federal Regulations (as such section is in effect on the day before the date of the enactment of this paragraph); and
